chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 436 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of pre-arrest bail 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of pre-arrest bail 08.08.2025 Mr. Hamayoun Sheikh, Advocate along with applicant (on bail). Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned DPG refers to the order dated 16.05.2025, passed by learned Additional Sessions Judge-I, Sukkur, whereby the bail application of the present applicant was dismissed for non-prosecution, and further states that since the said application was dismissed on this ground, the applicant is required to approach the same Court in order to acquire the orders on merits. Accordingly, learned Counsel for the applicant requires this pre-arrest bail application to be converted into a protective bail application in order to approach the said learned Additional Sessions Judge. Ordered accordingly. The applicant is granted five days’ time enabling him to approach the said learned Additional Sessions Judge against the surety already furnished by him in terms of the order dated 22.05.2025. During this period, the applicant shall not be arrested. This order shall cease to have effect either upon expiry of the five days’ period or as soon as the applicant appears before the concerned Court, whichever occurs earlier. It is further clarified that if the applicant fails to appear before the concerned Court within stipulated period, his bail bond shall stand automatically forfeited. The bail application stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
